refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to availability in heavy equipment systems.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period; verify that availability ratio meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

candidate_dps: Redundant system components and fault-tolerant design
Automated recovery procedures and failover mechanisms

potential_sources: Dependency on telemetry data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
Interaction with Safety Services for fault alerts
coupling_check.notes: DP logically focuses on monitoring and diagnostics, which can be modularized with clear interfaces to other systems.

assumptions_risks: Risk of delayed fault detection impacting availability
High safety criticality requires robust fault handling
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating automated recovery DP in next decomposition level to address rapid recovery explicitly.

im_boundary.name: Safety Services
im_boundary.scope: Module responsible for monitoring system health, fault detection, and safety-critical alerts.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time system status and sensor data from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends fault and safety alerts to operators and other system components.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates communication with remote monitoring and teleoperation systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused on fault monitoring; higher diffusion risk.
Contains physical components but limited scope for centralized fault monitoring.
Focuses on remote control, not fault monitoring; high diffusion risk if assigned.
Best containment for fault monitoring and safety alerts; low diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing fault monitoring and diagnostics in Safety Services minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential overload of Safety Services if scope expands beyond monitoring
Dependency on timely and accurate telemetry data from other modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor scope creep in Safety Services; consider splitting monitoring and recovery functions if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (real-time fault monitoring and diagnostics) logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing availability through fault detection.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk due to clear containment in Safety Services module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Safety Services module provides strong containment for the DP with well-defined interfaces.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by monitoring fault detection rates and availability metrics via Safety Services.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of fault monitoring DP to Safety Services IM with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan next level decomposition to explicitly address rapid fault recovery DP.
Validate telemetry data reliability assumptions in integration testing.

decision.justification: While the fault monitoring DP and IM assignment are sound, the rapid fault recovery aspect of availability is not yet addressed and should be decomposed further.
next_level_sub_frs: Enable rapid fault detection and recovery

revise.why: To explicitly decompose and address rapid fault recovery as a separate functional requirement.

assumptions: Telemetry data is reliable and timely.
Safety Services can handle fault monitoring without excessive scope creep.
open_risks: Potential overload of Safety Services module.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data latency and accuracy metrics.
Performance data of Safety Services under fault load.
